arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Gent – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea begin their maiden Europa Conference League campaign by welcoming Belgian outfit Gent to Stamford Bridge. Unlike the Champions League and Europa League, this competition’s league phase only consists of six matches. Enzo Maresca has almost a clean bill of health, with club captain Reece James the only injured member of the senior squad.
